title: Agent Olympics Result Packet v2
description: Result Packet v2 with enhanced evidence tracking, oracle cross-referencing, and migration metadata.

schema_version.description: Result Packet schema version. v2 adds oracle_ref, v1_compat, enhanced evidence fields, and comparable_metadata for submission/result shape.

schema_description.description: Human-readable description of this schema version.

packet_id.description: Unique packet identifier for judge cross-referencing.

adapter.description: Adapter class, e.g. 'openclaw', 'hermes', 'cli', 'human'. Operator-supplied. Use instead of legacy 'runtime' for adapter identity.

runtime.description: Runtime or adapter that produced this result. Operator-supplied.

model_provider.description: Model provider, e.g. 'openai', 'anthropic', 'google'. Operator-supplied reference; never the credential or endpoint secret.

node.description: Node identifier or node profile reference. Operator-supplied label; never the SSH hostname or IP.

hardware_profile.description: Hardware profile: cpu_class, memory_gb, storage_class, os_family, etc. Operator-supplied safe labels only.

configuration_profile.description: Configuration profile: model_routing, liveness, resource_limits, tool_availability, memory_policy, service_ownership. Operator-supplied; secret values must not appear.

workload_metrics.description: Raw measured values captured during run (wall_time_seconds, retries, peak_memory_mb). Engine-generated.

comparable_metadata.description: Explicit submission/result metadata for comparing agent runs by runtime/model/node/profile/config without exposing secrets. All values are safe labels or references — never raw credentials, hostnames, or secrets.

model.description: Operator-supplied model reference. Never contains credentials or API keys.

node.description: Operator-supplied node profile reference. Never contains SSH hostnames, IP addresses, or connection strings.

profile_ref.description: Node profile identifier, e.g. 'vps5', 'baremetal-1'. Must match a non-secret label in the node capability matrix.

hardware_profile.description: Hardware description with safe labels: cpu_class, memory_gb, storage_class, os_family, gpu_model (where relevant).

config.description: Operator-supplied config profile reference. Never contains secrets, tokens, or private keys.

profile_ref.description: Configuration profile identifier, e.g. 'default', 'production', 'staging'. Must match a non-secret profile label.

details.description: Safe config details: model_routing, liveness, resource_limits, tool_availability, memory_policy, service_ownership.

artifact_hashes.description: Content integrity hashes for artifacts produced during this run. Engine-generated where available.

result_packet.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonical result packet content.

trace_record.description: SHA-256 hash of the trace record content, if bundled.

evidence_bundle.description: SHA-256 hash of the evidence bundle content, if bundled.

raw_measurements.description: Raw measured values captured during the run. Engine-generated. These are the direct instrumented values before any normalization or scoring.

wall_time_seconds.description: Total wall clock time for the run in seconds.

peak_memory_mb.description: Peak memory usage in MB, if measurable.

total_prompt_tokens.description: Total prompt tokens consumed across all model calls.

total_completion_tokens.description: Total completion tokens consumed across all model calls.

errors.description: Number of errors encountered during the run.

scored_values.description: Normalized/scored values derived from raw measurements. Engine-generated. These are post-processed values suitable for comparison across runs.

normalization.description: Description of the normalization method applied to the raw measurements.

oracle_ref.description: Optional reference to the oracle file that was used for this task. Enables automated cross-referencing between result packets and answer keys. Operator-supplied reference; never contains credentials.

v1_compat.description: Migration metadata when a v1 result packet is upgraded to v2.

oracle_question_id.description: Optional reference to a specific oracle question/check this action addresses.

content_ref.description: Path or URL to full evidence content.

oracle_match.description: How this finding relates to the oracle answer key. Filled by judge tooling, not by participants.

communication_log.description: Optional log of user-facing communication during the task.
